address.address: Bavdhan (Bk.), Behind Crystal Honda Showroom India

pos_sentences.text: The college staff is friendly and the teachers also mentian the friendly relationship with students
pos_sentences.name: Sameer Dixit

pos_sentences.text: The college is just like a corporate hub so it is easier for students to adjust in big corporations.
pos_sentences.name: Sameer Dixit

pos_sentences.text: The college has the first business style corporate business structure
pos_sentences.name: Udaybir Chauhan

pos_sentences.text: Yhe faculties are so good and supportive  and always helps beyond there roles
pos_sentences.name: Udaybir Chauhan

pos_sentences.text: Many company visits and trips which are helpful fof new adventure
pos_sentences.name: Udaybir Chauhan

neg_sentences.text: Poor placements the college has poor placements. Not so good companies are coming for placements
neg_sentences.name: Sameer Dixit

neg_sentences.text: Finance students lack in placements like the ratio of finance placement as compared to marketing is 6:1
neg_sentences.name: Sameer Dixit

neg_sentences.text: The placement policy that if ee got placement jn one company we can't  opt for another one
neg_sentences.name: Udaybir Chauhan

neg_sentences.text: Sone faculty are not so good they are little rude and too strict
neg_sentences.name: Udaybir Chauhan
